seconds.vision_desc: glass jar candle with deep tunnel down the middle, tall pale wax walls, warm side light
slow dolly closer, dark shaft visible at center, faint smoke wisp
wax walls thick against the glass, tunnel edges uneven
camera drifts in, the hollow reads clearly as wasted wax
faint glow from deep in the shaft
close view of the rim and the deep hole
tunnel interior shadows deepen as the camera settles
final close framing of the tunneled jar candle

windows.embed_text: a glass jar candle with a deep tunnel burned down its middle, tall pale wax walls around a dark shaft, faint smoke wisp, rustic wooden bench in warm side light | slow dolly close-up of candle tunneling defect
